TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Wu_Lei, title = Wu_Lei, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wu_Lei} }

S.FORM: == Wu Lei == kawas tay 1999, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Wu Lei, squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Wu Lei minkahul Shanghai na Cyukoku. pinqbaqan nya Wu Lei, t'aring kawas tay 2017 tehuk kawas tay 2021, mqwas biru sa Beijing ega' pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Wu Lei hiya ga m'engi. Wu Lei ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga ·月升滄海 (2022) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors canpyuta hknyun

== Wu Lei == kawas tay 1999, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Wu Lei, squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Wu Lei minkahul Shanghai na Cyukoku. pinqbaqan nya Wu Lei, t'aring kawas tay 2017 tehuk kawas tay 2021, mqwas biru sa Beijing ega' pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Wu Lei hiya ga m'engi. Wu Lei ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga ·月升滄海 (2022) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: == wu lei == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, wu lei, s~ɕquliq na ʦ~ʨjukokuʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral wu lei minkaħul s~ɕħaŋħai na ʦ~ʨjukoku. pinqβaqan nja wu lei, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βeijiŋ eɣaʔ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja wu lei ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. wu lei ima pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nja zjuwaw ɣa ***** (****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
